Title: How Many Tokens Did You Burn Today
Description: Early in my career, a manager at one of the big firms where I worked made a request so absurd it remains etched in my memory. I walked back to the team, repeated what he had asked, and couldn't finish

Title: The Real Cost of Owning a Home — Eric Turner
Description: Owning a home costs a lot more than just the mortgage. Here are the hidden costs to consider when deciding whether to buy or rent.
